title: Multiple dates create multiple entries in My Week
excerpt: I’m tracking multiple dates in an opportunities/sales board (date added, projected close, projected start, next task, etc.). That’s great…but it creates an entry in My Week for every one of those. How can I disable these…

posts.author: element47 (Eric Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m tracking multiple dates in an opportunities/sales board (date added, projected close, projected start, next task, etc.). That’s great…but it creates an entry in My Week for every one of those. How can I disable these entries from showing up in My Week?

posts.author: V.B.Music (Mike  Alducin)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! if you can post here a screenshot of your board maybe i can help but i think the issue you have can be solved changing what type of date you week shows you. You can select “only deadlines” or “all dates”. Maybe if you choose “only deadlines” your problem would be solved

posts.author: element47 (Eric Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: Changing the MyWeek settings did the trick!
